creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have you followed all steps from my manuals?
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/-/tree/master/update

If yes, I cannot not really help you further.

I would try to collect log files and report this upstream:
https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/issues

Maybe they can help you further.

I tried the current versions with a new installation and with an upgrade and both setups are working fine.

So you missed there something while doing the upgrades or you have something broken in your jail.

Maybe you can make a backup (also described in the manual) and setup a new jail and restore the backup there. Maybe it works then.
